◎简　　介  

　　Friends deal with new emotions and revelations in this romantic comedy-drama. Hoping to rebuild his relationship with his dad, Ian (George Newbern) invites his pals to their ski chalet. Jon (Stephen Baldwin) wants Carla (Claudia Schiffer), but so does a ski instructor (Robert Downey Jr.). Virginal David (Danny Nucci) tries to get lucky, while Keaton (Neill Barry) sets aside fam...
